title: aeschynomene minutiflora subsp. grandiflora
intro: Aeschynomene minutiflora subsp. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered horsefly pea, is a sub-species of plant in the legume family that is native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The large-flowered horsefly pea has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Aeschynomene minutiflora subsp. grandiflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
